text: Being here, I feel a sense of anticipation and curiosity. There is a distant murmur of conversation coming from the glass-walled room—I see people engaged in a focused activity, perhaps learning or collaborating. The orderly lines and modern architecture give me the impression of a space that values knowledge and innovation. The angles and reflections catch my eye, making me acutely aware of my own observer status. I am an outsider here, looking in, positioned on the boundary between passive witness and potential participant. It fills me with a quiet longing to understand the ideas being exchanged within.
